sourceExport: No raw export committed. Use this as the commit-safe target shape after a live Confluence Automation export is sanitized.
redactionNote: Live Atlassian account IDs, cloud IDs, connection IDs, rule UUIDs, component UUIDs, checksums, ARIs, page IDs, space IDs, and private page URLs must be replaced with placeholders before commit. This file documents the governed automation shape and is not intended to be imported as-is.

juneManualFirstRun.name: Release Health Analyst - June 2026 Assessment Draft

actions.name: Use agent
actions.agentInstruction:
Rerun the Release Health Analyst assessment for the existing June Mobilitas release assessment page.

Current assessment page:
<current-june-assessment-page-url-redacted>

Release identity:
Mobilitas 2026.06.12

Release stage:
<confirmed-from-current-page>

Code freeze date:
<confirmed-from-current-page-or-release-plan>

Source-truth branch:
<confirmed-from-current-page-or-release-plan>

Use the current assessment page as prior state and use current accessible evidence from Jira, Confluence, QA/testing, deployment/change, release notes, and any release drift handoff/history if present.

Do not edit, append, create, or update any Confluence page.
Do not plan Confluence actions.
Return only copy-ready content for a draft child page.

Follow:
- Template - Release Health Analyst Assessment Page
- Prompt Library - Release Health Analyst Assessment Pages
- Rerun Existing Assessment Page workflow

Preserve useful existing blockers, risks, accepted exceptions, source gaps, questions, and follow-up items unless new evidence supersedes them.
Move cleared items to Resolved Or Superseded Items with evidence.
Keep final readiness human-owned.

Include:
- Assessment Fingerprint
- Previous State From Current Page
- New Evidence Reviewed
- What Changed Since The Current Page
- Updated Readiness Summary
- P1 Blockers
- P2/P3 Risks And Cleanup Items
- Accepted Exceptions And Caveats
- Resolved Or Superseded Items
- Source Completeness
- Questions For Release Owner
- Fully Updated Page Body
- Next Assessment Instructions

Do not make the final human go/no-go decision.
Do not transition Jira issues.
Do not approve or merge PRs.
Do not change release status.

actions.name: Publish new page
actions.destinationPageTitle: Release Health Assessment Draft - Mobilitas 2026.06.12 - {{now.convertToTimeZone("America/Phoenix").format("yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm")}} MST UTC-07 - {{now.format("HH:mm")}} UTC

validationRequired: The agent prompt prohibits Confluence edits, appends, creates, and updates.
The publish action uses {{agentResponse}} as the page body.
The publish action parent is the current June assessment page.
The first run creates a child page and does not change the parent page version.

julyManualWithDriftEvidence.name: Release Health Analyst - July 2026 Assessment Draft

actions.name: Use agent
actions.agentInstruction:
Create or rerun the Release Health Analyst assessment for Mobilitas 2026.07.10.

Current assessment page:
<july-assessment-page-url-redacted-or-not-yet-created>

Release identity:
Mobilitas 2026.07.10

Release stage:
<before-code-freeze-at-code-freeze-or-after-code-freeze>

Code freeze date:
2026-06-23

Source-truth branch:
<develop-before-freeze-or-release-branch-after-freeze-once-confirmed>

Release Drift evidence:
<canonical-july-release-drift-page-or-latest-draft-url-redacted>

Use Release Drift Monitor output as source evidence only after verifying exact release identity, source-truth branch, unresolved WARN/BLOCK/UNKNOWN findings, accepted exceptions, and source freshness.

Do not treat Release Drift Monitor findings as automatic go/no-go decisions.
Do not edit, append, create, or update any Confluence page.
Do not plan Confluence actions.
Return only copy-ready content for a draft child page.

Follow:
- Template - Release Health Analyst Assessment Page
- Prompt Library - Release Health Analyst Assessment Pages
- Rerun With Release Drift Handoff rules when drift evidence is provided

Keep final readiness human-owned and keep source completeness visible.

actions.name: Publish new page
actions.destinationPageTitle: Release Health Assessment Draft - Mobilitas 2026.07.10 - {{now.convertToTimeZone("America/Phoenix").format("yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm")}} MST UTC-07 - {{now.format("HH:mm")}} UTC

driftEvidenceGate: Exact release identity must be Mobilitas 2026.07.10.
Source-truth branch must match the release stage or documented override.
Source freshness must be acceptable for the assessment run date.
Unresolved BLOCK, WARN, and UNKNOWN findings must be identified and carried as evidence.
Accepted exceptions must be documented as human-owned caveats.
Release Drift Monitor findings must not become automatic readiness decisions.

operatingDecision.canonicalPageHandling: Do not let the agent edit or append the canonical Release Health Analyst assessment page during the pilot.
operatingDecision.draftHandling: Automation publishes one draft child page under the release assessment page per manual run.
operatingDecision.humanReview: A human reviews the draft child page and manually promotes useful content into the canonical page, preserving normal Confluence page version history.
operatingDecision.writeBoundary: The Rovo agent remains action-disabled. The deterministic Confluence automation action creates the draft page from {{agentResponse}}.
